login.pageSubtitle: Sign in with the email address you used at checkout. We send you a link — no password needed.
login.title: Sign in
login.linkSent: ✓ Check your email. We've sent you a sign-in link.
login.linkSentHint: The link is valid for 15 minutes. If you can't see it, check your Spam folder.
login.hint: If the email address isn't recognised, you won't receive any message.
login.errorInvalidLink: The sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
login.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in an hour.
login.errorGeneric: Unable to send the link. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Welcome
dashboard.subtitle: Your orders and purchase history.
dashboard.emptyOrders: No orders have been placed with this email address yet.
dashboard.reviewAfterDelivery: You'll be able to leave a review once your order has been delivered.
